_note: Hand-edited. Commit after each update. Fetched by the frontend directly — not processed by any script.

_format.scenario.current: One of: Bull | Base | Bear | Tail Risk
_format.china_m2.value: Trillions CNY. Source: PBOC Money Supply table. Raw figure is in 100M CNY — divide by 10000.
_format.uk_m2.value: Billions GBP. Source: BOE series LPMVWYX. Raw figure is in millions GBP — divide by 1000.
_format.global_m2.value: Trillions USD. Your composite: sum of US+EU+JP+CN+UK M2 converted to USD.
_format.global_m2.yoy_pct: Year-over-year % change. Calculate vs same period prior year.
